home.desc: Your ultimate headquarters. Control your collection, discover decks, generate matches and master the rules.
home.collection_desc: Mark the packs you own to filter decks and generate custom matches.
home.decks_desc: Browse thousands of community-created decks, with exact matches for your cards.
home.tracker_desc: Replace table tokens and track health, threat, and status during the game.
home.randomizer_desc: Let chance decide. Generate random heroes, aspects, and villains for a brutal challenge.
home.history_desc: Keep a journal of your clashes and track your evolution.
home.dashboard_desc: View your win rate, best heroes, and worst villains.
home.builder_desc: Build custom decks using only the cards in your collection.
home.campaign_desc: Manage your offline campaigns without needing a paper logbook.
home.rules_desc: Keyword dictionary, detailed villain phase, and quick references.

tracker.title: Match Tracker
tracker.subtitle: Full Mode: Status, threat, turns and extras.
tracker.landscape_warning_desc: Tracker is optimized for landscape mode.
tracker.notes_placeholder: Notes (e.g., Shadows of the Past revealed...)
tracker.no_extras: No extra counters on the table.
tracker.remove_hero_desc: Are you sure you want to remove this hero from the tracker?
tracker.reset_tracker_desc: Are you sure you want to reset the entire tracker?
tracker.mp_desc: Keep Villain health and Threat synchronized in real-time across devices via WebRTC.
tracker.mp_host_desc: You are the Host. Share the ID or show the QR Code below to players.
tracker.mp_guest_desc: You are a Guest. The tracker is mirroring the Host (ID: {{id}}).
tracker.mp_host_sub: Create a room and be the central hub (Host).
tracker.mp_join_sub: Enter the room ID generated by the Host or scan the QR Code.

dashboard.empty_desc: Play some matches and log them in history or Randomizer to see your performance here!
dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Analyze your performance and overall combat statistics.

collection.title: My Collection
collection.subtitle: Select the expansions and packs you own.

history.title: Match History
history.subtitle: Combat log and statistics.
history.empty_log: No matches recorded yet. Go to Randomizer to log one!
history.delete_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this match record?

randomizer.title: Match Generator
randomizer.subtitle: Generate a random encounter and deck based on your collection.
randomizer.no_hero: No hero found in your collection.
randomizer.no_villain: No villain found in your collection.
randomizer.share_desc: Scan this QR Code or copy the direct link to load this random deck into the Deck Builder and edit it!

decks.title: Deck Database
decks.subtitle: Discover thousands of decks created by the community.
decks.no_decks: No decks found using only cards from your collection.
decks.author: Author
decks.share_desc: Ask a friend to scan this QR Code with their phone camera or copy the direct link to load this list instantly!

campaign.title: Campaign Log
campaign.subtitle: Track your progress, HP and upgrades in major campaigns.
campaign.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this campaign?
campaign.campaign_completed_desc: You saved the day. Check the history below for details.

rules.title: Game Manual
rules.subtitle: Quickly consult official rules and turn guides for Marvel Champions.
rules.search_placeholder: Spotlight: Search for Overkill, Tough, Setup, Stunned...
rules.player_desc: During your turn, you can perform any number of the actions below, in any order. You can also ask other players to trigger abilities on your turn.
rules.form_desc: Flip your Identity card (Only 1x per turn).
rules.play_desc: Pay the cost by generating resources from your hand or play area.
rules.basic_desc: Exhaust the Identity to Attack, Thwart, Defend or Recover.
rules.ability_desc: Trigger text on cards already in play.
rules.turn_step1: Discard any cards you don't want from your hand.
rules.turn_step2: Draw cards up to your current form's hand size.
rules.threat_desc: Place threat on the Main Scheme based on the printed value × number of players.
rules.attack_desc: The villain activates once per player, following table order:
rules.attack_hero_desc: Give 1 facedown Boost. Declare defenders. Reveal the Boost and deal damage.
rules.attack_ae_desc: Give 1 facedown Boost. Reveal the Boost and place that much threat on the scheme.
rules.encounter_desc: Deal 1 facedown encounter card per player (+1 for each Hazard icon in play).
rules.resolve_desc: Reveal the dealt cards one by one (in player order) and resolve their effects.
rules.next_player: Pass the First Player token to the left and restart the turn.
rules.dict_desc: Use the search bar at the top to search for any other Keyword in the game.
rules.tough_desc: Prevents the next instance of damage. Discard the status card immediately after preventing damage.
rules.stunned_desc: Replaces the character's next attack by discarding this card instead.
rules.confused_desc: Replaces the character's next thwart by discarding this card instead.
rules.manuals_desc: Access the official guides in their original PDF format (Requires a PDF reader). They are saved offline in the app.
rules.learn_desc: The basic guide for your first game. Explains step-by-step how the game works.
rules.ref_desc: The complete official FFG dictionary with all the minutiae.
rules.ref_pt_desc: Translated version to Portuguese with advanced details and terms.
rules.footer_link: For complex tournament rulings (RRG 1.7+), consult the Hall of Heroes.

builder.title: Deck Draft
builder.subtitle: Build your deck using cards from your physical collection.
builder.share_desc: Ask a friend to scan this QR Code with their phone camera or copy the direct link to load this list instantly!

challenges.title: Challenge of the Week
challenges.subtitle: Measure your skills against the global community!
challenges.no_active_desc: Stay tuned. The great villains rest... for now.
challenges.no_entries: Be the first to beat this challenge!
